title: Post-M8 design tokens and component system implementation
summary: Implement Wuming Town UI tokens and reusable HUD component styling for panels, buttons, alerts, resource cards, resident cards, inspector and command bar placeholders.
acceptance: Defines implementation-facing tokens for color, typography, spacing, panel, button, alert, resource card, resident card, inspector and command bar surfaces
Uses CSS/React/Pixi placeholders compatible with the asset replacement contract and avoids hardcoded final art images
Improves visual identity toward wood, paper, ink, lamp light and civic record language without one-note palette or marketing page layout
Keeps text contained at required viewport sizes and does not place cards inside cards
Adds focused tests or E2E assertions where style states affect interaction/accessibility

history.details: Implemented post-M8 design tokens/component surfaces; web-shell E2E and quality pass; WM-0118 artifacts restored out of diff.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified scoped UI token/component changes, command placeholders remain non-authoritative and localized, no forbidden dependency/art/release-verdict changes, WM-0118 artifacts are clean, reachability helper still rejects unrelated overlays; reproduced typecheck, expected unit-filter failure, handoff/task validation, diff check, quality, and targeted non-artifact web-shell E2E.
Verified by Gate the 3rd; full integration gates passed in WM-0133 worktree.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified scoped UI token/component changes, command placeholders remain non-authoritative and localized, no forbidden dependency/art/release-verdict changes, WM-0118 artifacts are clean, reachability helper still rejects unrelated overlays; reproduced typecheck, expected unit-filter failure, handoff/task validation, diff check, quality, and targeted non-artifact web-shell E2E.

integration.summary: Verified by Gate the 3rd; full integration gates passed in WM-0133 worktree.
